title: 宝塚記念の後に・シンデレラ粉砕

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
The lord of the castle has won—I am the
undisputed Overlord! Nothing short of obsession
will suffice to defeat a ruler.

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
That is what I say to my potential eternal
adversary... And it is also what I say to myself.

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Look around at what my feats have produced—a
horde of enemies threatening to hinder my true
stride. Lo! A challenge worthy of a king if I've
ever seen one!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Now is the time to press forward and build a
dynasty. My nation will witness its foundation at
the Japan Cup!
